details.test: Task 1: Buy 2 cheapest rock tickets in New York (<= $60 each)
Task 2: Book 3 adjacent lower-bowl seats (<= $75 each)
Task 3: Add 4 tickets for an evening event under $200 total
Task 4: Apply promo code LAUGH10 during checkout
Task 5: Choose cheaper of two events for 2 tickets and keep in cart
Task 6: Find highly rated event under price limit and add 1 ticket
Task 7: Manage cart to keep only 1 music ticket and remove sports tickets
Task 8: Seat map selection and mobile e-ticket delivery
Task 9: Create profile and set Boston + Theater preferences
